10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squats
10 Broad Jumps

3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Snatch Balance
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

strength.name: Snatch Balance
strength.description:
1x2 | E2MOM 10min
Work Up to a Top Set of 2. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 rounds for Time - 10 min Cap
6 Power Snatches @ 50/35
8 Burpee Box overs
10 Assault Bike Cals

hypertrophy.reasoning: Snatch work heavily taxes shoulders and quads; horizontal pulls and posterior chain balance without competing for recovery.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Snatch Balance, 1 by 2. Strength: Snatch, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 6 Power Snatches @ 50/35, 8 Burpee Box overs, 10 Assault Bike Cals. For hypertrophy, focus on back (horizontal pull), glutes, hamstrings.
